reviews.review_description:
Nice setting, great and awesome graphics.
Good in-game store.
It's cheap. Storymode not available. World looks awesome. Grand Canyon looks awesome.

Thanks for this little masterpiece. I need an open World, a Worldmap and it must be possible to walk around on an open World. Map inclusive.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the great review and supporting the store! Open world is a becoming a popular request. I'll see what I can do in future updates.

reviews.review_title: Not personally for me but looks great
reviews.review_description:
The graphics are good and water looks amazing and the sound effects are fab the rock formation looks cool.
For the younger audience this is a great game but for the older crowd, I found it quite dull and no re playability for me.

Steering the tube had it's moments and wouldn't get to the fish or birds in time, by the way they looked great and even the butterflies looked amazing.

Well done to the development of this game, just not for me I'm afraid.

Very relaxing, maybe too relaxing but don't be put of by my review please, as I gave it 4 stars.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! I'll keep all of this in mind as I continue to build out the game. Please keep an eye out for future updates.

reviews.review_title: A great day on the river
reviews.review_description: Suggested a single player game and the developer came through brilliantly. Enjoy the canyon views, the birds and fish, the fireworks, and the game play. Looking forward to the new things coming. Great game. Thanks.

developer_response.body: Thanks Dean! I'm so glad to see that you came back to check out the single player mode. Stay tuned for more updates coming to the canyon.

reviews.review_description: So fun, so chill. Just what I needed in the heat of the desert right now. The sounds, the flow, the views...really relaxing. Thanks devs!

developer_response.body: Escaping the heat of the real desert by visiting the VR canyon! Good stuff. Thanks.

reviews.review_description: Really relaxing. Feels like your really tubing. As you go add in purchases for different scenery. Happy tubing!
Developer fixed the issue I reported and the app works great now. Beautiful rock formations and fish swimming in the water are fun to watch and are very realistic. Great job and thank you!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the wonderful feedback. Maybe I'll see you on the river!
Matt

reviews.review_title: Crystal clear waters were made for tubes
reviews.review_description:
Very relaxing and fun game! 

From bug infested evenings, to rainy days, nothing keeps me from tubing... Well maybe some logs or rocks! The game has you tubing crystal clear waters with fish swimming around you, through a windy river with lots of obstacles to destroy and score points.  There are birds flying around, a peaceful speed  to the game play, and beautiful scenery. Well done on this game! Looking forward to playing with a friend and relaxing down the river together!

Looking forward to see what's next.

developer_response.body: Thank you! As an indie dev - working on my first game - this feedback means a lot to me. Whitewater sections, anchoring, and more coming soon...
